title: The Bone Accord
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: When the bone-oracle of a besieged mountain city dies mid-prophecy, her three apprentices must assemble her fragmented vision from the dead woman's skeleton before the invading army breaches the wall, but each bone tells a different version of the future.
long_description: When the bone-oracle of a besieged mountain city dies mid-prophecy, her three apprentices must assemble her fragmented vision from the dead woman's skeleton before the invading army breaches the wall, but each bone tells a different version of the future.
